heading.zh: 方位词表示方向与关系

body.en: Directives (in, on, to, from, up, down, over, through, with, by...) show where and how. Operator + directive = a verb. Master these few words and you can describe almost any movement or relation.
body.zh: 方位词（in, on, to, from, up, down, over, through, with, by…）表示位置和方式。操作词+方位词=一个动词。掌握这些少数词，几乎能描述任何动作或关系。

examples.text: put the cup on the table

gloss.en: a little more or less than

words.example: It costs about $10.

gloss.en: from one side to the other side

words.example: We walked across the road.

gloss.en: later than; following in time

words.example: We can play after lunch.

gloss.en: opposing somebody or something

words.example: He leaned against the wall.

gloss.en: in the middle of a group

words.example: The house is among the trees.

gloss.en: used to show a place or point

words.example: We met at the corner of the street.

gloss.en: earlier than; in front of

words.example: Wash your hands before you eat.

gloss.en: in the space separating two things

words.example: The shop is between the bank and the park.

gloss.en: past; near; using a means

words.example: Just drive by. Don't stop.

gloss.en: to or at a lower place

words.example: She jumped down off the chair.

gloss.en: used to show where something starts

words.example: She walked away from him.

gloss.en: inside an object, area, or space

words.example: She opened the door and went in.

gloss.en: away or removed from something

words.example: He took his coat off.

gloss.en: touching or on top of something

words.example: Put your coat on.

gloss.en: across; above something

words.example: The bird flew over the house.

gloss.en: from one side or end to the other

words.example: The water runs through the pipe.

gloss.en: used to show direction or purpose

words.example: I went to the shop to buy food.

gloss.en: below or beneath something

words.example: The cat is under the table.

gloss.en: towards or in a higher position

words.example: He jumped up from his chair.

gloss.en: in the company of somebody or something

words.example: She lives with her parents.

gloss.en: used to compare two people or things

words.example: You're as tall as your father.

gloss.en: used to show who gets or uses something

words.example: There's a letter for you.

gloss.en: belonging to or relating to somebody

words.example: He is a friend of mine.

gloss.en: up to a time; until

words.example: We're open till 6 o'clock.

gloss.en: used to compare two things

words.example: I'm older than her.
